title: Warfre's Tweaked Crafting
description: All the crafting tweaks together. Alongside some new utilities.
body:
# All the crafting tweaks together!

- **Trim dupping** now only requieres 1 diamond
- **Sherd-dupping**
- Cheaper chains, stairs, leather, trapdoors, banners, and bricks
- Crafteable chain mail
- **Wood cutter** (cut wood in the stonecutter)
- Strip logs and wood in the stonecutter
- Faster and more eficient **smokers and blast furnaces**. They now smelt at 3 times the speed and consume 50% less fuel
- **Dewax** copper blocks in the stonecutter
- Smelt or blast concrete powder into stained glass
- Smelt raw blocks into the material's block
- Blast your tools and armor into entire ingots
- Smelt gilded blackstone into gold ingots
- Craft Gilded blackstone with blackstone and gold ingots
- Craft rooted dirt with dirt and hanging roots
- Turn 4 mangrove roots into mangrove log
- Craft bottles of enchanting
- Cut stairs into slabs
- Cut fences into fence gates
- Cut doors into trapdoors
- Cut preassure plates into buttons
- Craft charcoal, dry sponges and leaf litter in the smoker
- Craft nether bricks and bricks in the blast furnace
- Dry clay balls in campfires to get bricks
- And use both rabbit hide and leather for bundles
- Uncraft honeycomb and amethyst blocks back into haneycomb and amethyst shards
- Craft dead bushes and short dry grass in furnaces and smokers
